mapper.sql: device_id, device_name, device_model, category_id, location, purchase_date, status, max_borrow_days
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device (device_name, device_model, category_id, location, purchase_date, status, max_borrow_days) VALUES (#{deviceName}, #{deviceModel}, #{categoryId}, #{location}, #{purchaseDate}, #{status}, #{maxBorrowDays})
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET device_name = #{deviceName}, device_model = #{deviceModel}, category_id = #{categoryId}, location = #{location}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, status = #{status}, max_borrow_days = #{maxBorrowDays} WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
UPDATE device SET status = #{status} WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM device WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
